summary: Iteration 143: In-app Notification System Testing - All tests PASSED. Backend APIs (GET /api/notifications/counts, GET /api/notifications/unread-ids/{event_type}, POST /api/notifications/mark-read) return correct data structures and handle auth/validation properly. Frontend correctly displays red badges on Decisions navbar link when unread notifications exist, shows blue dots and blue background on unread decision cards, and marks notifications as read when viewing decision detail page. Mobile navigation shows notification dot on hamburger menu.

backend_api_tests.test_invalid_event_type_returns_400: PASS - Returns 400 with detail message for invalid event_type
backend_api_tests.test_admin_notification_counts: PASS - Admin can access notification counts
backend_api_tests.test_participant_counts_structure: PASS - Participant can access notification counts
backend_api_tests.test_participant_unread_ids: PASS - Participant can access unread IDs

frontend_tests.navbar_decisions_link: PASS - Decisions link present with data-testid='navbar-decisions-link'
frontend_tests.navbar_litiges_link: PASS - Litiges link present with data-testid='navbar-litiges-link'
frontend_tests.navbar_decisions_badge_admin: PASS - Red badge shows count '1' for admin user
frontend_tests.navbar_decisions_badge_participant: PASS - Red badge shows count '3' for participant user
frontend_tests.unread_dot_indicator: PASS - Blue dot (data-testid='unread-dot-{id}') visible on unread cards
frontend_tests.unread_card_blue_background: PASS - Unread cards have bg-blue-50 and border-blue-200 styling
frontend_tests.decision_detail_page_loads: PASS - Detail page loads with all expected elements
frontend_tests.mark_as_read_on_detail_view: PASS - Badge count decrements after viewing decision detail
frontend_tests.mobile_hamburger_notification_dot: PASS - Hamburger shows notification dot when unread notifications exist
frontend_tests.mobile_drawer_opens: PASS - Mobile drawer opens with all navigation links
frontend_tests.litiges_page_empty_state: PASS - Shows 'Aucun litige en cours' when no active disputes

critical_code_review_comments: notification_service.py: Idempotent notification creation (lines 26-32) prevents duplicate notifications
notification_routes.py: Proper validation of event_type with 400 error for invalid values (lines 42-44)
AppNavbar.js: Correctly fetches notification counts on mount and every 30 seconds (lines 59-73)
AppNavbar.js: Red badge (bg-red-500) for unread notifications, amber badge (bg-amber-500) for active disputes (lines 131-136, 140-144)
DecisionsListPage.js: Fetches unread IDs and applies blue styling to unread cards (lines 26-34, 64-69)
DecisionDetailPage.js: Marks notification as read on mount (line 40)
DisputesListPage.js: Fetches unread IDs for dispute_update type (lines 57-64)
DisputeDetailPage.js: Marks dispute notification as read on mount (line 50)
Mobile nav correctly shows notification dot on hamburger when any unread notifications exist (lines 178-180)

test_credentials.participant: igaal@hotmail.com / Test123! (role=user, has 3 unread decision notifications)

context_for_next_testing_agent: In-app notification system fully implemented and tested. Admin user (testuser_audit@nlyt.app) had 1 unread decision notification which was marked as read during testing. Participant user (igaal@hotmail.com) has 3 unread decision notifications. No active disputes exist currently (all resolved), so dispute_update notifications cannot be tested with live data. The notification triggers (open_dispute, submit_position, escalation, resolve_dispute) will create notifications automatically when new disputes occur. Login route is /signin. Rate limiting is 10 requests per minute on login endpoint.

rca_of_the_issue.original_task: Implement unified in-app notification system with lu/non-lu (read/unread) logic for Decisions and Litiges
rca_of_the_issue.implementation_verified: Backend: notification_service.py provides CRUD operations, notification_routes.py exposes API endpoints. Frontend: AppNavbar.js shows badges, DecisionsListPage.js and DisputesListPage.js show unread indicators, detail pages mark notifications as read.
rca_of_the_issue.data_testids_verified: navbar-decisions-badge, navbar-litiges-badge, navbar-decisions-link, navbar-litiges-link, unread-dot-{id}, decision-card-{id}, dispute-sub-card-{id}, navbar-mobile-menu-btn, navbar-mobile-drawer, mobile-nav-decisions, mobile-nav-litiges
